## Monitoring goals (D5.3)

This work supports **Deliverable D5.3** — reporting on the measurements, behaviour, and
reliability of the deployed QKD network. The dashboard is a proof-of-concept for
**monitoring** an entanglement-based QKD link: tracking coincidence rates, visibility and
QBER, polarization-drift correction, and clock-synchronization health over time.
